mapper.select:
SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, NAME AS name, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role FROM USER_INFO
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND RIGHT(REPLACE(REPLACE(PHONE, '-', ''), ' ', ''), 4) = #{keyword}
AND MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY NAME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOAN (BOOK_ID, MEMBER_ID, LOAN_DATE, STATUS) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{memberId}, #{loanDate}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT L.LOAN_ID AS loanId, B.TITLE AS bookTitle, B.AUTHOR AS bookAuthor, U.NAME AS memberName, U.PHONE AS memberPhone, L.LOAN_DATE AS loanDate, L.STATUS AS status FROM LOAN L JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID = B.BOOK_ID JOIN USER_INFO U ON L.MEMBER_ID = U.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY L.LOAN_ID DESC
